title: My Quarto Website
text:
Welcome
Hello! My name is Nakir, and I am a PhD candidate in Geospatial Information Sciences at The University of Texas at Dallas. My research focuses on remote sensing, deep learning for crop identification, and spatial data analysis.
This website includes: - About Me – Learn more about my research and background. - Future sections (Projects, Publications, etc.)
Feel free to explore!
📧 Contact: md.nakir.ahmed.09@gmail.com

title: About
text:
About Me
I am Nakir, a PhD candidate in Geospatial Information Sciences at The University of Texas at Dallas. My research focuses on remote sensing, deep learning for crop identification, and spatial data analysis. I have experience in Python, R, ArcGIS, and Tableau.
Currently, I am working on cassava identification using UAV imagery and exploring different CNN models to evaluate their performance in Guyana.
